videoSnippet.title: One of The Greatest Attacks Ever Unleashed || Topalov vs Anand || MTel Masters (2005)
videoSnippet.description:

Veselin Topalov vs Viswanathan Anand
"Topology" (game of the day Jun-18-2011)
MTel Masters (2005), Sofia BUL, rd 6, May-18
Queen's Indian Defense: Fianchetto. Check Variation Intermezzo Line (E15) 

1. d4 Nf6 2. c4 e6 3. Nf3 b6 4. g3 Ba6 5. b3 Bb4 6. Bd2 Be7 7. Nc3 c6 8. e4 d5 9. Qc2 de4 10. Ne4 Bb7 11. Neg5 c5 12. d5 ed5 13. cd5 h6 14. Nf7 Kf7 15. O-O-O Bd6 16. Nh4 Bc8 17. Re1 Na6 18. Re6 Nb4 19. Bb4 cb4 20. Bc4 b5 21. Bb5 Be7 22. Ng6 Nd5 23. Re7 Ne7 24. Bc4 Kf6 25. Nh8 Qd4 26. Rd1 Qa1 27. Kd2 Qd4 28. Ke1 Qe5 29. Qe2 Qe2 30. Ke2 Nf5 31. Nf7 a5 32. g4 Nh4 33. h3 Ra7 34. Rd6 Ke7 35. Rb6 Rc7 36. Ne5 Ng2 37. Ng6 Kd8 38. Kf1 Bb7 39. Rb7 Rb7 40. Kg2 Rd7 41. Nf8 Rd2 42. Ne6 Ke7 43. Ng7 Ra2 44. Nf5 Kf6 45. Nh6 Rc2 46. Bf7 Rc3 47. f4 a4 48. ba4 b3 49. g5 Kg7 50. f5 b2 51. f6 Kh7 52. Nf5
